nasb.text: But that slave went out and found one of his fellow slaves who owed him a hundred denarii; and he seized him and began to choke him, saying, ‘Pay back what you owe.’

esv.text: But when that same servant went out, he found one of his fellow servants who owed him a hundred denarii,  and seizing him, he began to choke him, saying, ‘Pay what you owe.’

cnv.text: 那僕人出來，遇見一個欠了他一百個銀幣的僕人，就抓住他，扼著他的喉嚨，說：‘把你欠我的錢還給我。’

ccb.text: “可是，那奴仆出去后，遇见一位欠他一百个银币的同伴，就揪住同伴，掐着他的喉咙说，‘还我钱！’

csbs.text: “但那奴仆出去以后，遇见一个与他同做奴仆的；这人欠他一百个银币    。他就抓住这人，掐住这人的喉咙，说：‘把欠我的还给我。’
